headline: Could Digital Realty Trust (DLR) Be 18% Undervalued Following Its $2.28b Equity Raise?
summary: Digital Realty Trust (DLR) has just completed a follow on equity offering of roughly US$2.28b, issuing about 12.3 million common shares at US$185 each, a modest discount to the market price. See our latest analysis for Digital Realty Trust. At a latest share price of US$180.41, Digital Realty Trust’s recent 7 day share price return of 4.10% contrasts with a 90 day share price return that is down 4.48%, while the 3 year total shareholder return of 67.42% points to stronger longer term...
